triggered_flags.flag_description: Average score is below the pass threshold for this dataset scale.
triggered_flags.recommended_action: Review the weakest assessment topics and schedule tutor support before the next assessment.

triggered_flags.flag_description: Submission punctuality is below the expected threshold.
triggered_flags.recommended_action: Use deadline reminders and submit drafts earlier to reduce late-submission risk.

non_triggered_flags.flag_description: Absences are within the high-absence risk limit.
non_triggered_flags.recommended_action: Keep monitoring attendance and confirm there are no new absence spikes.

non_triggered_flags.flag_description: Scores are maintaining an upward or stable trend across assessments.
non_triggered_flags.recommended_action: Continue monitoring assessment feedback over time.

recommended_actions.recommended_action: Review the weakest assessment topics and schedule tutor support before the next assessment.
Use deadline reminders and submit drafts earlier to reduce late-submission risk.

task_output_contract: Use checklist style: triggered flags first, then non-triggered flags briefly.
For triggered flags, state flag_value versus threshold plus severity, description, support category, and existing recommended_action when supplied.
Do not invent new risk flags or new recommendations outside returned flag evidence.
For every triggered flag, explain the existing recommended_action; do not create a replacement action.
